text:

Author: jwb

Log:
  biology/stacks: Drop dependency on gcc

  Replace compiler:openmp with compiler:c++11-lang and localbase
  Set USE_GCC for i386 to work around limitations in clang atomic (PR 230888)

  PR:             port/247753, ports/252379
